---
title: "ICE I-213 analysis 2022-2025"
author: "UWCHR"
date: "2026-02-18"
output:
    html_document:
        html_preview: true
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 3
        toc_float: true
        code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=TRUE}

options(scipen = 1000000)

library(pacman)

p_load(here, tidyverse, zoo, lubridate, ggplot2, plotly, gghighlight, viridis, ggmap, tidygeocoder, sf, rnaturalearth)

```


```{r load_data, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=TRUE}

file <- "sea-i213s-2026-02-13-geocoded.csv"

df <- read_delim(here('analyze', 'input', file), delim='|')

```

```{r apprehension_date}

# Less than 1% of records have apprehension date prior to 2022, we can exclude
nrow(df[df$apprehension_date < "2022-01-01",]) / nrow(df) *100

```

```{r}

p1 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         week >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(week) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = n)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per week",
       subtitle = "Seattle AOR")

p1

p2 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(month) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per month",
       subtitle = "Seattle AOR")

p2

p2.1 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  mutate(state = case_when(state %in% c("WA", "OR", "AK") ~ state,
                         TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(month, state) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, color = state, group=state)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per month",
       subtitle = "Seattle AOR")

p2.1

p3 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  mutate(state = case_when(state %in% c("WA", "OR", "AK") ~ state,
                         TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(month, state) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, fill = state)) +
  geom_col(position='stack') +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per month",
       subtitle = "Seattle AOR")

p3

p3.1 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>%
  count(month, state) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, color = state)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Immigration arrests in Oregon outpace Washington in Oct.-Dec. 2025",
       # subtitle = "Seattle AOR"
       )

p3.1

p3.2 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         apprehension_date >= "2025-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>%
  count(month, state) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, color = state)) +
  geom_line() +
  annotate(
    'text',
    x = as.Date("2025-05-01"),
    y = 310,
    label = 'Steady increase in arrests\nacross region during early 2025',
    fontface = 'bold', 
    size = 4.5
  ) +
  annotate(
    'text',
    x = as.Date("2025-07-01"),
    y = 810,
    label = 'Surge of arrests in Oregon\nduring Oct.-Dec.',
    fontface = 'bold', 
    size = 4.5
  ) +
  labs(title = "Immigration arrests in Oregon outpace Washington in Oct.-Dec. 2025",
       # subtitle = "Seattle AOR"
       )

p3.2

```

Tacoma has largest share of out-of-state I-213s, which makes sense if these represent transfers from elsewhere processed at NWDC. Also out-of-state I-213s declining over time which tracks border enforcement trends.

```{r state_by_office}

dat <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  mutate(state = case_when(state %in% c("WA", "OR", "AK") ~ state,
                         TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(cy, site_code, state)

p1 <- dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = site_code, x = n, fill = state)) +
  geom_col(position="fill") +
  facet_wrap(~cy)

p1

```

```{r pct_increase}

i213s_per_month_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(month) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 )

i213s_per_fy_quarter_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(fy_quarter) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 )

i213s_per_cy_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(cy) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 )

i213s_per_cy_pct_change_state <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>% 
  count(cy, state) %>% 
  group_by(state) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 ) %>% 
  arrange(state, cy)

# These will be comparing partial FYs
i213s_per_fy_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01") %>% 
  count(fy) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 )

```

```{r arrests_per_state_cy}

total_arrests_cy <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         ) %>% 
  mutate(state = case_when(state %in% c("WA", "OR", "AK") ~ state,
                           TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(cy) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 )

arrests_per_state_cy <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         ) %>% 
  mutate(state = case_when(state %in% c("WA", "OR", "AK") ~ state,
                           TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(cy, state) %>% 
  group_by(cy) %>% 
  mutate(pct_annual_total = n / sum(n) * 100) %>% 
  group_by(state) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 )
  

```


```{r arrests_per_state_fy_quarter}

i213s_per_fy_quarter_state_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         ) %>% 
  mutate(state = case_when(state %in% c("WA", "OR", "AK") ~ state,
                           TRUE ~ "ALL OTHERS")) %>% 
  count(fy_quarter, state) %>% 
  group_by(state) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 ) %>% 
  arrange(state, fy_quarter)

p1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_state_pct_change %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, fill = state)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter")

p1

p1.1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_state_pct_change %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, fill = state)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter")

p1.1


p2 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_state_pct_change %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = pct_change, fill = state)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "% change I-213 arrests per FY quarter")

p2

p3 <- i213s_per_cy_pct_change_state %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = cy, y = pct_change, fill = state)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  labs(title = "% change I-213 arrests per CY")

p3
  
```

```{r}

i213s_per_fy_quarter_site_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2022-01-01",
         # state %in% c("WA", "OR")
         ) %>% 
  count(fy_quarter, site_code) %>% 
  group_by(site_code) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 ) %>% 
  arrange(site_code, fy_quarter)

p1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_site_pct_change %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, fill = site_code)) +
  geom_col(position="stack") +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter by suboffice")

p1

p1.1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_site_pct_change %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, color = site_code, group = site_code)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter by suboffice")

p1.1

p2 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_site_pct_change %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = pct_change, fill = site_code)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "% change I-213 arrests per FY quarter by suboffice")

p2

```

```{r county_pct_change_wa}

i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2024-10-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")
         ) %>% 
  count(fy_quarter, county, state) %>% 
  group_by(state, county) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 ) %>% 
  arrange(state, county, fy_quarter)

p1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(state == "WA") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, fill = county)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  # scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter by county")

ggplotly(p1)

p1.1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(state == "WA") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  # scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter by county") +
  facet_wrap(~county)

p1.1

p2 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(state == 'WA') %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = pct_change, fill = county)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  # scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "% change I-213 arrests per FY quarter by county")

ggplotly(p2)

p2.2 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(state == "WA") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = pct_change)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "% change I-213 arrests per FY quarter by county") +
  facet_wrap(~county)

p2.2

```

```{r county_pct_change_or}

p1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(state == "OR") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, fill = county)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter by county")

ggplotly(p1)

p1.1 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(state == "OR") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n, fill = county)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "I-213 arrests per FY quarter by county") +
  facet_wrap(~county)

p1.1

p2 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(state == 'OR') %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = pct_change, fill = county)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  scale_x_discrete(breaks = every_nth(n = 2)) +
  labs(title = "% change I-213 arrests per FY quarter by county")

ggplotly(p2)

p3 <- i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(state == 'OR') %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = pct_change, fill = county)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  facet_wrap(~county)

p3

```

```{r}

poo_i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2024-10-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR"),
         site_code == "POO"
         ) %>% 
  mutate(county_state = paste(county, state, sep=", ")) %>% 
  count(fy_quarter, county_state) %>% 
  mutate(fy_quarter = factor(fy_quarter)) %>% 
  complete(fy_quarter, county_state, fill=list(n=0)) %>% 
  group_by(county_state) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 ) %>% 
  arrange(county_state, fy_quarter)

top_counties <- poo_i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(fy_quarter == "2026.1") %>% 
  arrange(desc(n))

p1 <- poo_i213s_per_fy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(county_state %in% head(top_counties$county_state, 9),
         fy_quarter != "2025.2") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = fy_quarter, y = n)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  facet_wrap(~county_state) +
  labs(title = "Arrests by Portland ICE field office increase across OR, WA")

p1

```

```{r}

i213s_per_cy_quarter_county_pct_change <- df %>% 
  filter(apprehension_date >= "2025-01-01",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")
         ) %>% 
  mutate(county_state = paste(county, state, sep=", ")) %>% 
  count(cy_quarter, county_state) %>% 
  mutate(cy_quarter = factor(cy_quarter)) %>% 
  complete(cy_quarter, county_state, fill=list(n=0)) %>% 
  group_by(county_state) %>% 
  mutate(prev_n = lag(n),
         pct_change = ((n - prev_n)/prev_n) * 100 ) %>% 
  arrange(county_state, cy_quarter)

top_counties <- i213s_per_cy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(cy_quarter == "2025.4") %>% 
  arrange(desc(n))

p1 <- i213s_per_cy_quarter_county_pct_change %>% 
  filter(county_state %in% head(top_counties$county_state, 9),
         ) %>% 
  mutate(cy_quarter = str_replace(cy_quarter, "\\.", "Q")) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = cy_quarter, y = n)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single")) +
  ylab("n") +
  xlab("Calendar quarter") +
  facet_wrap(~county_state) +
  labs(title = "Arrests increase across OR, WA during 2025",
       subtitle = "Top counties by total arrests during Oct.-Dec. 2025")

p1

```


# Method

```{r}

top_method <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         apprehension_date > "2024-12-31") %>% 
  count(apprehension_method_descr) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n))
  
p1 <- df %>% 
  filter(area_of_responsibility_code == "SEA",
         apprehension_date > "2024-12-31",
         state %in% c("WA", "OR")) %>%
  mutate(apprehension_method_descr = case_when(
    str_detect(apprehension_method_descr, "CAP") ~ "Custodial Arrest",
    apprehension_method_descr == "Other efforts" ~ "All others",
    apprehension_method_descr == "Located" ~ "Non-Custodial Arrest",
    apprehension_method_descr == "Non-Custodial Arrest" ~ "Non-Custodial Arrest",
    apprehension_method_descr == "Custodial Arrest" ~ "Custodial Arrest",
                                               TRUE ~ "All others")) %>% 
  count(month, apprehension_method_descr) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = n, fill = apprehension_method_descr)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(title = "Enforcement surge in 2025 driven by community arrests",
       fill = "Apprehension method")

p1


```
